_meta.citation: ROADMAP SC-3 verbatim: parallel-shift, gradual-rise, fall-then-rise on 5/1 ARM 30yr. Engine emits scenario_count=3 with reset_count=25 per path; sanity ordering holds: parallel-shift total_interest (719508.17) > fall-then-rise total_interest (563683.84).

notes: Engine-emitted worst_case_label is 'gradual-rise' (TI=720666.78) which slightly exceeds parallel-shift (TI=719508.17) because gradual-rise's terminal index reaches very high values (25*25bps step over 25 triggers = 625bps = 11.25%) where parallel-shift caps at lifetime_cap_bps=500 (10% effective). The plan-spec sanity ordering 'parallel-shift > fall-then-rise' holds (Decimal-safe). Per D-05-01 engine-emitted values.
